lines.x: Welcome to the annual Obsidian Festival!
Siesta! Let me hear you!!
(Thunderous cheering)
No matter who you are or where you're from, forget about all that stuff from now on and leave your troubles behind!
The Obsidian Festival needs each and every one of you to take part in it!! Live it, breathe it, feel it!!
Let me see those hands! I want to see all of y'all!
(Thunderous cheering)
This year, we're going to select our Hottest Artist, just like we do always do!!
So, while you're having the time of your life during the festival, don't forget to vote!
Attention! You will only have one chanceto vote, and you won't be able to change your mind after you've made your decision.
But don't worry, as the results will not affect the rewards you get!
As long as you cast your vote and complete all the milestone missions, you'll receive the milestone rewards corresponding to the artist you voted for!
Whoooooooooo!
Don't hesitate to vote for your favorite artist!
Now then, prepare to cast your vote!! Tell me who this year's hottest artist is going to be!!
The sample data from the volcano monitoring station has been retrieved. Please look over it.
Just tell me the results.
Those people over there said that the sample's temperature has not yet exceeded the highest on record for this year.
It's also not quite at the levels of the peaks from the past three years. The state of steam emissions is normal as well.
So...
So?
So, the station concludes that nothing abnormal will happen with the volcano, and your request for announcement has been denied once again. The mayor also...
You've got to be kidding me!!
Although my methods may be a bit simple, I'm sure that there's something amiss about this sample here.
The volcano was already in a precarious state last year!
But they didn't even send a warning or make a news report! Nothing at all!!
Miss Ceylon, p-please calm down.
If the monitoring station says that there's no abnormality, nobody will trust us no matter what we do.
I'm sorry...
Can we really rely on the monitoring station's data?
To be honest, Siesta's City Council doesn't pay much attention to this. Perhaps something is wrong with the detector.
That would mean that the fact that the volcano has become abnormal is being covered up.
So, what are you going to do next?
I can't explain the current phenomenon based upon what I know. If we can't get an accurate report from those in charge, we'll have to turn to an outside organization.
So far, things are stable here and we still have time. Would we be able to find some professionals among the tourists here if we took the time?
Even though we can't expect to find the right people, nor can we expect them to reach the correct conclusion, this is our last chance...
The tourists have already begun to pour into Siesta.
After all, the Obsidian Festival is about to begin. If we don't act now, it'll soon be too late.
10:10 A.M. \ Clear
Siesta
Dear tourists, welcome to Siesta, home of the annual Obsidian Festival.
Thank you for choosing Siesta as your vacation getaway. You won't be disappointed!
Here, scorching heat is turned into sizzling passion, freeing you from the stress and exhaustion of daily life. Immerse yourself in the charms that Siesta City has to offer!
This year, there's more to Siesta than just our sunny beaches and dazzling azure waters. Don't you forget about the great Obsidian Festival!
Over the next two weeks, there will be delicious food, fun activities around the clock, and last but not least, the greatest music festival ever!
We've invited the hottest names from all over the musical world as our special guests, to bring you an exciting music festival you won't forget!
During the festival, we've opened up various facilities and activities to the public, free of charge, so play to your heart's content!
In Civic Square, the Rock Party and the unlimited supply of local beer are the stars of the show!
Cut loose, and lose yourself to the rhythm!
Looking for something more leisurely? The jazz paradise is located just on the square of Herman Hotel on Second Avenue.
No rules, and no limits. As long as you want to be here, we want you here as well!
The Garrison Amusement Park is open 24/7 during the festival, and boasts the biggest stage in the city.
Other than the regularly scheduled shows, we'll also have some special guest appearances. If you're a fan of rap, you're not going to want to miss out!
In addition, there will be plenty of shows and activities throughout the city for you to enjoy.
Please ask the staff as well as the guards for a map of the festival.
We've marked the event locations as well as their times to make it easier for you to plan in advance.
But while you're enjoying the merriment, make sure to pay attention to the weather.
Today's temperature is 96.8° F, the highest recorded this summer. Please avoid staying in the sun too long to prevent sunburn and heatstroke.
Thank you, and have a great time!
Siesta really is a prime tourist city. The atmosphere here is filled with excitement.

opts: I didn't expect it to be this lively here.
They've been holding one large event after another.

lines.x: Neither did I!
None of us expected it to be such a spectacular place. We originally thought it was just another normal coastal city.
Thanks for the recommendation, Dr. Kal'tsit.
...I'm not interested in that place. Just go there yourselves.
Wait for me! I wanna come too!
Stop right there. You're not allowed to go since you're still recovering.

opts: I don't mind a place like this.
Her recommendations are definitely spot on.

lines.x: Doctor, I'm happy as long as you're enjoying it here.
We've been through too much recently. You deserve a break.
A lot of our fellow Operators have come with us, so let's all take this opportunity to relax.
Ah, Doctor, look! Someone's playing the piano in public.
Look, there are guitarists over there, as well as violinists. Wow, even dancers too...
It reminds me of when I used to practice the violin every day.
The streets give off a totally different vibe than the beach.
This is my first time seeing so many performers in one place, it makes me want to join them.
No no, that's not what I meant. I'm not really going to join them!
If I wanted to get back to the level I was at before, I'd have to start practicing again.

opts: But I don't think those guys are any better than you.

lines.x: Th-that's not true!
But, I'm still happy to hear you say that, Doctor.
Hey, Sora?
Ah, Doctor! Amiya! Good morning, are you two also headed to Second Avenue?
Good morning, Sora. I didn't know you were a fan of jazz as well.
I thought you would've preferred pop music more.
When it comes to music, I'm an expert in all the genres!
...Actually, I wanted to check out some other places, but the show near the hotel last night was way too loud. I couldn't sleep without earplugs.
Even though it's great to be able to listen to music throughout the day, anything will get on your nerves if it's keeping you up at night.
Because the others got a bit too crazy last night, all I can do is take a little breather around here.
It's a music festival after all, that just proves how lively things are here.
Ahaha, guess so. A few of us have never seen the ocean before.
For example, Ifrit rushed out this morning yelling something like 'Here I come, ocean!!' We haven't seen her ever since.
Haha, that's just like her.
Technically, this ocean is really just a huge lake...
As long as there's water and a beach, it's enough of an ocean for me.
I'll be resting here until noon. After that, even a volcanic eruption can't stop me from having the time of my life!
Haha, that certainly is your style. All right, I'll see you around then.
All righty~ Amiya, Doctor, have a good time as well!
It is now 11 o'clock! Everyone, did you have a fabulous morning?
Let's first enjoy a cozy Siestan brunch as the merriment of the afternoon approaches us.

Today, a special guest will be joining us. Let's welcome Mister Cronin, Assistant to the Mayor of Siesta and Catastrophe Messenger. Mister Cronin, why don't you tell us a bit more about Siesta and its volcano?
Welcome to Siesta City, my friends.
Siesta is home to lush mountains and clear waters, sunny skies and refreshing breezes, and the most passionate people in the world.
Due to the rare and perfect natural environment that we've been gifted, Siesta is committed to becoming the best tourist hotspot and bringing you an unforgettable summer getaway.
On this subject, let's talk about the Siesta Volcano. Many tourists who are unfamiliar with volcanoes may have questions about this. Care to explain it to our listeners?
Gladly. First, there's nothing to be worried about. Unlike what some people may think, the Siesta Volcano is our friend, not something filled with mysteries and dangers.
I can guarantee this as a Catastrophe Messenger, so please rest assured.
As you may already know, Siesta's development owes greatly to the Siesta Volcano.
Some of you may remember the Catastrophe that almost hit Siesta a number of years back. But because of the volcano's protection, Siesta was totally unaffected.
Speaking of which, Siesta has another special feature - obsidian.
Obsidian is believed to have the ability to suppress Oripathy, so it has become increasingly popular in recent years.
That's right. The small number of Infected in Siesta is the best proof of that.
You may have heard rumors or even scientific 'theories' from outside, but the reality within Siesta is the best evidence.
Unfortunately, obsidian mining has been banned by the government in order to protect the volcano's habitat.
Nevertheless, the trade of existing obsidian products is legal, so if you're interested in these products, please head over to the market.
During the festival, shopping guides as well as souvenir stalls will be scattered throughout the city, so feel free to take your pick!
The volcano has brought Siesta a precious gift, and it is our wish to pass this gift onto all of you. We hope that you will all enjoy the festival.
Thank you very much, Mister Cronin. We will see you later.
Obsidian can keep Oripathy at bay? I've never heard about that before.
And that Catastrophe Messenger... the way he was dismissing science made me a bit uncomfortable...

opts: Wouldn't it be great if Oripathy could be cured so easily?
Tourist cities always have some way to make a quick buck.

lines.x: In remote places like this, many people still do not know about Originium or Catastrophes.
I don't know if that's a blessing or a curse.
Of course ignorance is a curse!
Skyfire, Provence! Good morning!
Morning, Amiya. Doctor.
What a coincidence to run into you guys here. Getting ready to hit the beach?
We're just looking around. What about you two?
We're going to take a look around the base of the volcano.
The base of the volcano? Let me check the map.
There's no mark on it. Is there some special activity going on there?
No, no. Skyfire just suddenly felt like taking a field trip.
And I'm a Catastrophe Messenger, as you know. Taking a quick survey of the land when I get to a new place has just become a habit of mine.
As a researcher, I'm curious about the ecosystem of the volcano. We rarely get the chance to get up close and personal with a volcano, after all.
That's some serious dedication, to be doing this during your vacation, Skyfire.
Eheh. Of course. For me, that's what a vacation is.
All right then, we have to get going. Bye!
Then, we should get going as well, Doctor.
The largest beach in Siesta is just ahead of us.
Let's go!
One Mango Martini Smoothie please.
Okay. Here you go, a Mango Martini Smoothie.
Two double-scoops of Strawberry Tequila Ice Cream please.
Here you are! Two double-scoops of Strawberry Tequila Ice Cream, coming right up! And, you get a free waffle!
Gummy~
Oh, Amiya! And the Doctor as well. Good to see you~
Gummy, how'd you end up running a stall here?
There's an entire food court by the beach. The sponsor gave the chance for tourists to show off their cooking skills.
Given an opportunity like this, I naturally had to promote some of Ursus's local favorites!
However, there are way too many tourists here, and I'm getting a bit overwhelmed.
Hey Miss, I'd like three cups of Fermented Bubble Tea with Pudding.
Coming right up!
Oh right, Doctor, can I borrow Amiya for a bit?
Huh?
If Amiya is helping me out, I'll be just fine.
After we're done here, I'll take her to watch the show on the beach at night!
Mm... all right then.
Doctor, call me if you need anything, okay?
Hmm, you know what Gummy thinks? Amiya's stressed out from always following you around, Doctor.
When she's with you, she never thinks about herself, which isn't good.
It, it's not like that...
I'm not buying it.
Besides, Doctor, you're going to scare away all my customers, all wrapped up like a mummy. Amiya is way cuter than you.
Th-that's not true... But, Doctor, I'll stay here and help Gummy.
So, Amiya, let me teach you how to use this machine.
Mhm.
Ah, no, you gotta change your outfit first. Hurry, over here, let me get you into something a bit easier to move around in!
Doctor, you make sure to enjoy yourself as well! Buh bye!

opts: Amiya should spend more time with her peers.
(Guess I'll go take a look the beachside open-air hotel by myself.)
Maybe I really should change into something a bit more summery...

lines.x: Hey, did you hear that? There was another fight at First Avenue last night.
No, I live on Fifth. I reckon it was another fight between fans?
Yeah. Jeez, talk about crazy. The way those guys were going at it, you'd think they killed the other guy's parents or something.
Peace is best, after all.
...So, why don't you take off that outfit of yours already? ！
It's not every day we get to go on vacation, so why are you all wrapped up like that?
Hey, were you not going to come tonight? Join us!
...Don't tell me you're going dancing again tonight.
Of course we're going. We came here to dance!
Give me a break, just go by yourselves then. I can barely feel my feet from following you guys the last three nights...
Come on, it's still early! Give it a few more tries, and you'll get used to it!
Hello, whiskey for two.
Well well, with the way you're dressed, you look a bit unusual for a tourist...

opts: ...I'm a bit scared of sun exposure.

lines.x: Even so, you came out all the way to the beach? What a weirdo.
...Ah, I suppose I'm one to talk though.
Sorry about that, let me put that one on my tab.

opts: (Weren't the drinks supposed to be free?!)

lines.x: So, what do you think about this budding city?
I'm quite fond of her, you see. Youthful, but maturing well.
Though I wasn't born here, this place is my home now.
And I'm willing to pay a lot in order to protect it.
No matter where people are from, they all hold the same love for their family, right?
Boss, Mister Cronin is looking for you.
...I know.
I still have work to do. I'll be off then, stranger.
I hope that you too can fall in love with this city.
Hey, Doctor, can you hear me?
Is there anyone by you? I have something very serious to report!
It's something that may influence whether this city lives or dies...
Provence.
Provence, you're absolutely, positively sure I can't burn this place down to the ground?
All these useless branches and weeds are really getting on my nerves.
This is the tenth time I've heard you complaining this hour, princess.
Besides, I originally planned on just checking out some stuff alone while collecting some samples for Eyjafjalla along the way.
You offered to join me in this investigation yourself, so nobody's forcing you to stay if you can't handle it.
Right now, the others are having fun at the beach. You should join them instead of going through this mess here with me.
I can't leave you alone, not with your tendencies.
Even though you're a Catastrophe Messenger, only my knowledge can keep you safe in this kind of fire hazard area.
All the more reason we can't set this entire mountain on fire.
Even though I know this is your specialty... we're on vacation this time. It'd be best to keep a low profile.
Otherwise, Amiya and the Doctor will end up having to clean up the mess again.
Fine, for their sake, I'll try to put up with this a bit longer.
Hey, do you see that black-colored outcropping over there?
Looks like it might be obsidian. Let's go check it out.
Careful now, don't just go running around. And especially, don't set stuff on fire.
Phew... Keeping her in check is more tiring than the investigation itself.
But something's off... Even if it's summer, this kind of heat... doesn't seem natural.
Big tail.
Hey, Big tail!
Hmm? Wait, you mean me?
Did you notice a weird smell earlier?
Now that you mention it...
Hmm. Very faint, but it's definitely there.
The volcano is expelling more gas than I expected, and the test rune Eyjafjalla gave me is reacting.
By the looks of things, this place is going to go up in flames even without my help.
Something doesn't seem right about this volcano...
But the most we can do is turn to Eyjafjalla for confirmation.
Over here, we can get some samples from this outcropping.
Ha!
There, that should be enough!
We can do some preliminary tests on this sample with our equipment before sending it back to Rhodes Island.
Eyjafjalla should be able to turn the test results around right away.
Just based upon how this obsidian feels to the touch... I can't say for sure, but there's something different about it.
Also taking the smell and the temperature around here into consideration...
I can't say for certain, but...
What are you trying to say? Spit it out already!
Come at me! What are a few slugs going to do?! I'll take you all out right here!
Curses, the hem of my skirt got stuck...
C-can anyone hear me?! Why are there so many Originium slugs here?!
N-no! Stay away from me! Someone help me!
Someone's calling for help! It's coming from the beach!
Let's hurry over there!
Hey, wait for me!
Yeah, that's how we met Ceylon in the forest at the base of the volcano.
I have a question.
Did you really have to give an entire dissertation on how you saved me?
I'm with the lassie here. Plus, did I hear you say something about how you found me annoying?
Ah, um, you must have heard me wrong!

opts: Regardless, what's important is that everyone is safe.

lines.x: Umm, well, even though it's rather late for this, allow me to introduce myself.
My name is Ceylon Doykos, and I'm a graduate of Victoria National University as well an Originium researcher. I'm also the daughter of this city's mayor.
Who would've expected the mayor's daughter to be wandering around alone on the volcano?
Well, academic curiosity necessarily comes with its share of dangers...
Let's continue talking about that volcano...
A-ahem.
Thank you very much, strangers.
Don't mention it.
But, what brings you here alone?
Isn't this a bit too far for a long walk on the beach?
Hmm, judging by the tools you have on you...
Provence, she's here to investigate, just like us.
Huh, is that so?
She has a notebook with her, but she's also dressed to the nines.
Assuming she's not just a simpleton, then that means...
She had a flash of inspiration and rushed out of the house without even bothering to change, and then ran into trouble while still dressed like this.
I can't begin to tell you how many dresses I've gotten burnt this way.
Uhh, don't you think that's just a little abnormal?
Well, setting aside the thing with the dresses, you've pretty much got the gist of it.
I do have to say, it's rather dangerous to do that... especially if you're not prepared.
Don't worry. As long as I'm here, you could even come empty-handed and still be fine.
Anyways, thanks for saving me.
Come find me after I get back to town, and I'll be sure to repay you.
However, I have something important to do right now, so pardon me for my rudeness.
Oh, if you're still busy, then sorry for interrupting. However, it's best not to go to the volcano alone.
You should know how dangerous it is by yourself since you got attacked by these Originium slugs.
Well, that was just an accident. I was in a a hurry, so I wasn't paying attention to my surroundings.
I grew up in this city. If the Originium slugs really are that dangerous, the mayor would've done something about it.
...Hmm, all right. However, if you ask me, I'd say they gathered here for a reason.
Nothing's different about this place, so why would...
Wait, agitation due to changes in the environment.... So that's what's going on! Thank you, I have another line of evidence!
...Provence, by the looks of things, she reached the same conclusion as you.
Even though I'm not an expert on volcanoes, I do have a degree of understanding as a professional and comprehensive scholar.
Could you two also be here to look for proof?
Proof that the volcano is going to erupt?
An unusual and irritating odor, a higher temperature than normal, and aggressive Originium slugs...
Also, based on the presence of these infected creatures, this may be no ordinary volcano. The mining companies would go crazy if they found out that there might be Originium in this volcano.
Not many people know about the actual conditions of the volcano, and information about it is controlled by the City Council's relevant departments.
Agitation due to environmental changes... At least that gives me something to work with.
I've been looking for experts in this field to help ensure the safety of the city and its residents.
Please help me, and the city of Siesta, make it through these dangerous times.
Finally, through comparing isotopes and analyzing various samples, we've basically been able to confirm your hypothesis.
The frequency of volcanic activity has, without a doubt, been rising abnormally. Though there's no imminent danger of a Catastrophe, we cannot ignore the danger.
In two to four weeks, the volcanic activity will reach a critical point. Expect a Catastrophe to occur at that point.
If possible, I would recommend beginning evacuation efforts as soon as possible.
...To summarize, that's the conclusion I've drawn from the information you provided me.
That's Eyjafjalla for you. She can even give a 40-minute lecture over the phone.
Doctor, did you understand all that?

opts: In one ear and out the other.
Mhm, I understood the gist of it.

lines.x: That's what I thought as well. Before I could react, it was already over.
Wow, that's amazing, Doctor. I couldn't understand her at all...
Seeing those two over there, I thought I was the only one who wasn't getting it.
As expected of Eyjafjalla. Even I felt like I was just put through a seminar.
I see, so that's a true professional. I never knew the data could be analyzed like that.
I didn't expect to be presented with such a good learning experience. Jeez, I should have written it all down!
Even though the information we have right now is far from comprehensive, I've reached the same conclusion as you have. The volcano has most likely become active once more.
Unfortunately, I can't be there to further delve into why it has become active.
...Sorry. If we had a bit more on-site information, we'd be able to better predict the activity cycle.
That way, we'd be able to evacuate the citizens more easily.
We all know that you're passionate about volcanoes, Eyjafjalla.
You've already been a great help. Thank you very much.
I'm glad I had such a professional team like yours to help me confirm my findings.
Something might be wrong with the detector in the monitoring station. It hasn't detected any abnormal readings so far.
By the looks of things, my efforts were worth it.
We've got to send news of this to the City Council. Otherwise, the results could be devastating.
You're telling me that Siesta didn't even make any emergency plans for a possible Catastrophe before hosting such a large-scale event?
The people here probably haven't even considered the possibility of a Catastrophe, let alone made preparations for it.
My father went to the new development zone to conduct business about three months ago, and won't be back for a few more days. Now, his secretary, Cronin, is responsible for everything.
Cronin is also this city's Catastrophe Messenger. When we take the data and the samples down to the City Hall, he'll be able to understand the situation.
Even though I'm the mayor's daughter, I rarely get involved in the government's affairs.
But now that we have definitive proof, I might be able to get some help from the family.
Doctor, I have an idea. I want to head to the volcano again to check on that reason that Eyjafjalla mentioned.
Can you help Ceylon out while I'm gone?

opts: You're entering the volcano? Isn't that a bit too dangerous?!

lines.x: Catastrophe Messengers always put their lives on the line for their work, so don't worry. I have plenty of experience with this kind of stuff.
Although I'll only be able to call you from the hotel, I'll be sure to stay connected with the Doctor.
I'll also come with you.
Huh?
Got a problem with that? I can't just let you go alone. What if you ruin all the precious data?
Of course I have to go with you.
Um, all right, all right.
By the way, do we need to notify Amiya first?
Nah, it's fine. It's not that serious. As long as the Doctor knows about it, we're good.
So if that's all settled, let's get going, Doctor. Please prepare everything you need, and we'll head for the City Hall at 2 P.M.
Phew, that about wraps things up. I suppose I can finally relax a bit.
Doctor, here's some tea I brought back from Victoria. Would you like a cup?
I think you'll enjoy it.
Do you not know how to make tea? I'll help you then.
Mhm, I just know you'll like it.
You're a really difficult person, you know.
I'll have you know that this is one of the highest-grade teas in Victoria!
There you go. You'll definitely like it.
I make really good tea. You'll regret it your whole life if you miss this chance.
How stubborn. I had to say all that just to make you try it.
All right, just wait a moment.
Cross Civic Square, and the highest building over there is the City Hall.
What's up, everyone!! Thank you all for coming out here! This is... D— D— D——!
(Thunderous cheering)
We're all gathered here on this scorching summer day for the same purpose... and that is—
MUSIC!
What was that? I couldn't hear you! Gimme your loudest voice, and let the whole city know what you want!!
M U S I C ! ! ! !
In that case... put your hands up! Let's go!!
This is an everyday occurrence during the Obsidian Festival. After all, the concerts are one of the most beloved things about the Festival.
The major concert starts at night in Garrison Amusement Park, while at daytime, you can see small concerts in every district.

opts: This kind of music is a bit intense for me...

lines.x: Haha, but you know what, I studied in Victoria, so I prefer more elegant music and classical.
Even though classical artists are invited to the Obsidian Festival, this kind of music is more attractive to the tourists.
It started trending the last few years or so. When I was younger, jazz was all the rage.
I love spending the day on 2nd Avenue. With a few books with me, I can stay an entire day in one of the cafés.
Listening to music, having  a cup of green tea, and enjoying the sea breeze...
It was then that I thought, Siesta must be the best city in the world.

opts: You must really love this city.

lines.x: Of course! This is all possible due to the support I have, including from my family.
Besides my father, someone close to me works at the City Hall here.
You'll meet her soon. With her help, it will be much easier to determine how serious the problem is!

opts: It sounds like you really trust her.
Are you talking about your mother?

lines.x: My mother died when she gave birth to me. After that, my father buried himself in his work.
Since I was little, she has been taking care of me as my bodyguard. Her name is Schwarz.

Whenever my father was busy with work, she patiently kept my company. Though we're not related by blood, she treats me just like a sister would, so I consider her to be an important part of my family.
I'll introduce you to her when we meet.
Look, Doctor, we're almost there. Let's head straight in.
Mister Cronin, Miss Ceylon would like to see you.
What important matters bring you to the City Hall, milady?
Everyone is busy organizing the festival right now, so I'm afraid there is little time to spare.
Cronin, I'll get to the point. The Siesta Volcano is likely to erupt soon. I can't say exactly when, but it could be as soon as the next few days.
In other words, all the citizens and tourists will be in danger. We need to start evacuating them and help them find shelter.
We must stop the Obsidian Festival right away.
Oh milady, do you know what you're saying?
Anyone else would have been driven out the moment they talked to me like that.
But because you're special, I'm willing to explain it just for you.
You don't have to worry about the volcano 'issue' at all. Even though I don't know where you got your information, I can assure you that it's nonsense.
...Are you kidding me?
There's plenty of evidence that suggests that the volcano is active again and will likely erupt soon.
Such as?
Agitation of the Originium slugs living there, unusual changes in temperature, and a strange smell. The conclusion should be obvious.
If you don't believe me, read the material I brought. It contains a detailed analysis and the conclusion.
Obvious? Did you go interview the Originium slugs? Or maybe the hot air, or that strange smell?
I don't quite understand. What do these baseless numbers have to do with this so-called imminent eruption?
All I know is, I designed the volcano observation system, the mayor built it, and it is still working well.
Right now, the Siesta Volcano's parameters aren't much different from previous years. If anything, they're even more stable?
What are you talking about? The truth is right before you...

opts: You're a Catastrophe Messenger, and you don't even know this much?

lines.x: And who exactly are you?
Dr. Doctor is from a professional organization, with colleagues who are experts in volcanology.
These parameters were examined by the analysts from their specialized department.
I see, I see.
...Haha, I get it now.
So it was you bunch who managed to fool the mayor's daughter, strange visitors.
What are you talking about?
Milady, isn't it obvious? You were duped by this faceless stranger.
Cronin, what are you trying to say? You don't even believe my word?!
What I'm saying is, you've been studying abroad so you might not know this, but many people are jealous of Siesta's development.
These kinds of people appear every year. They've tried every trick in the book to try to stop our development. Blackmail, explosions, assassinations. They've even targeted no-name people like me.

Of course, this is not the first time that someone has tried to spread rumors about this so-called 'volcanic eruption.' However, it is the first time one of these rumors has even been able to deceive someone like you.
I must say, these grifters must have done their homework on the mayor. They even knew that you just returned from studying abroad.
And look at their nerve, marching into the City Hall like they own the place.
...You're right that I didn't know about this, but I'm telling the truth!
There's no way I'd just trust any stranger who shows up!
As far as I can tell, there's no difference between this 'Doctor' and the swindlers I've encountered in the past.
There's no depths to which they won't stoop in order to take away this city!

opts: If this is a joke, it's not very funny.

lines.x: Jumping to conclusions? Hah, that's what all you swindlers say.
What a coincidence. I didn't find your little joke funny either.
Milady, you're still young, so things like this are bound to happen sometimes.
But don't worry, these swindlers will be punished accordingly. This, I promise you.
Security.
Take them away.
Yes, sir.
Cronin! You won't even listen to me now?
You won't have your way as long as I'm here!
What a pity then. I can't just stand by and watch you disturb Siesta's order.
Hurry and arrest these con-artists already.
Also, suppress Miss Ceylon as well. Don't hurt her though; just let her calm down a little!

opts: Hurry! We need to get out of here!

lines.x: Quick! Doctor! Let's head towards the beach!
There are a ton of tourists gathered on the beach, so we'll be able to blend into the crowd and shrug them off!
Stand still!
You wish!
Schwarz! Great! You're finally here!
I'm so glad you're here. What's going on with Cronin?!
Doctor, she's the one I was telling you about...
Milady, Master Doykos is currently out of town. You ought to listen to Cronin.
Schwarz? What are you saying...?
Let's head back to Cronin now and hand these people over.
I do not wish to resort to violence, milady.
...Schwarz?
Schwarz?!
Cronin's orders are now the Mayor's orders. Everyone, go.
Tie these people up. Do not hurt Miss Ceylon.
What? Why?!
Do you also think I'm doing this for fun?!

opts: Now's not the time to talk!

lines.x: They are currently fleeing towards the beach!
Damn, it's too crowded. We won't be able to give chase. Call the sentry at the beach. Surround them!
Get back here!
Doctor, go. I'll handle things here.
Huh? You're...!

opts: Ceylon, let's get out of here first.

lines.x: Wait... *gasp* *gasp*... Doctor, I'm tired...

opts: We finally... made it... to the beach...
I can't... run any longer either...

lines.x: Milady, please come back with us.
No!
Don't hurt Lady Ceylon. As for that 'Doctor,' do as you please.
How dare you treat Doctor like that!!
It burns! It burns!!
Where'd that imp come from?!
Yowwwch! My butt! It's on fire!
Hey Doc, you're having fun again. Why didn't you call me?
Tsk... She's just a runt. Show her what we're made of!
Perfect. I was starting to get bored, hehe...
Doctor, you look even paler than before. What's wrong?

opts: Ifrit, try not to go overboard!
Burn off all their clothes and call it a day.

lines.x: Fine...
All right, medium rare it is!
Hoooooooot! I'm burning! I'm burning!
Eeek! My hair!
Tsk... Fall back, fall back!
Hahaha! See, nothing's more fun than a good scrap, Doc!
Oh, that reminds me, Doc. Because I saved you, and didn't go overboard like you asked me to, you'd better not tell Silence about this!
If she finds out about this, she's going to assign me more homework for sure!
Hehe, I knew that you're a nice person, Doc!
Hmph, you're on your own then!
An Originium-powered flamethrower, with such power too... You must be a very skilled Caster.
You're right on the money, Missy! I'm super powerful!
My name is Ceylon.
Thank you for saving us.
Oh, um... it's my pleasure. I-I'm just doing the right thing.
Hey Doc, this lady is really polite. What should I be doing now?
Oh, um, I'll try it then...
Ahh?! I forgot that I left meat on the grill! Gotta get going!
Doc, Ceylon, come find me afterwards if you want some barbecue!
Doctor, let's also hurry back.
Doctor, I'm glad you're fine.
Thank you very much, Mister...
You can call me Hellagur.
Just like the Doctor here, I'm also from Rhodes Island.
Doctor, do you have a minute? I need to have a few words with you, alone.
Alpha, Bravo, stay back and monitor them carefully. Charlie, wrap around and flank them.
Mercenaries, huh...
Whoever trained them must've been rather skilled. Not bad, but also not good enough.
Th-this old man is strong!
You're no match for him. Stand by for now.
(This woman... won't be simple to deal with.)
(These bodyguards won't be able to harm me, but she poses a threat.)
Foolish outsiders...
(She's angry now.)
(Perhaps from her perspective, she really believes that we deceived Miss Ceylon.)
(But, something's not right. Just who is she...)
You must be a pretty experienced mercenary, staying disciplined even though your Mistress is gone.
Cut the crap! Since you know that our boss was... Ugh...
Shut up.
(Hmm...? Wait... A crossbow, Feline, and that name...)
(Where have I heard that name before...)
Wait, what is this geezer doing?!
(I'm a bit worried about how the Doctor is doing.)
(...But the Doctor is capable enough, as are the others. There shouldn't be any issue.)
Is he senile or something? He's charging straight at us!
Hurry, stop him!!!
You'll have to be faster than that!
This Feline woman is not some no-name.

opts: But she still was no match for you.

lines.x: Don't worry. Her henchmen were mediocre at best. After ensuring your safety, it was a fairly simple matter for me to retreat.
However, I might know a thing or two about the identity of that bodyguard.
Columbian, Feline, female, silver hair, amber eyes, and a black crossbow. She's both a mercenary and an assassin.
For a hitman, being famous is nothing to be proud of, but the truth is that her feats were simply too astonishing.

For example, she once wiped out an entire clan in Columbia. It was a powerful clan as well. Gradually, over a few years, its important figures met violent ends one after another until the entire clan crumbled into nothingness.

Another example - she once hunted down an entire patrol group. This patrol was notorious for killing people at Columbia's border. Calling themselves 'Conquerors of the Barbarians,' their violence towards other races brought about many tragedies.
After a single month, they fled into the mountains but were slain left and right until only one member, disabled and incoherent, managed to make it back to the city.
The last example is the man who told me these stories.
I'll get to the point. He has a scar going from his left shoulder to his right heel.
Cold-blooded killers are abound here, and I'm one of them.
Of course, this particular woman has been missing for some time.
But if my hunch is correct, and they're the same person, then things are about to get real ugly.

opts: The waters here are a lot murkier than I expected.

lines.x: The mayor might not be blind to all of this.
As a matter of fact, I wouldn't even be surprised if the mayor was the one who hired her.
(Glass shatters)

opts: How long have you been here...

lines.x: Miss Ceylon, you don't have to eavesdrop.
I... I just wanted to get some water for you...
Mister Hellagur, when did that mercenary begin her career, and when did she go missing?
She had made a name for herself even before I was discharged.
As for when she disappeared, I'd say about a year ago, after that clan was annihilated.
...Schwarz had been taking care of me, up until six years ago.
But one day, she suddenly told me my father needed her for something, and just left. After that, I only saw her when she'd pick me up over Christmas.
B-but, I'm sure she was just in a bad mood, plus she was just following orders. There's no way she's a cold-blooded killer!
Furthermore, are you implying that my father is somehow behind Cronin's actions?!
I don't believe it!
I won't jump to conclusions. However, I must remind you that even the people you trust most cannot solely look out for your interests.

Whether she trusts you or not is none of my concern. All I know is, I would never mistake those scars inflicted by Ursine weapons. The squad that did that to her are now buried deep underneath the snow.
The situation should be clear to you, Doctor.
If the City Council also has a hand in circulating false information about the volcano, then we should stay out of this.
Miss Ceylon, you should also try to see the truth.
I... I need to calm down.
Doctor, if you would.

opts: Something that only I can do, huh?

lines.x: Naturally. She needs someone who can understand her.
...Would you be able to walk around a bit with me, Doctor?

opts: I'm a little worried about you.

lines.x: Doctor, did you know? When I was a child, this beach wasn't this busy. I used to like making sand castles by myself.
...This city is getting better and better every year, thanks to my father.
My father and I, well, don't talk a lot.
I've always wondered... Which is more important, this city and the wealth it brings, or me?
My mother died when she gave birth to me. Sometimes I think about if that's the reason why he doesn't like me.

And it feels like he doesn't care if I like him or not. Ever since I can remember, he has rarely been at home because of business. Rather than father and daughter, we're more like two strangers living under the same roof.
Schwarz, I want to go observe the ecosystem of the beach!
You mustn't, milady. Master Doykos said you must not go outside without good reason.
But I'm tired of reading the same old books here! Schwarz, you're no fun at all!
My apologies, milady. This is for your safety though; it's dangerous outside.
But won't you be with me? Are you going to put me in danger?
...Of course I wouldn't.
So, what's the problem then? Let's go!
...In that case, please do not stray from my sight.
One could say that back then, having Schwarz at my side just felt like a simple fact of life.
Hurry up, these ornaments are for tonight's concert.
We'll be in trouble if we don't make it on time!
Oh, that's...
If I remember properly, he's the grandson of the owner of the Mockingbird Café on Second Avenue.

I used to go there a lot. The old storekeeper was a kind man. His wife had already passed away at that time, so he decorated the café with her favorite flowers and bonsai trees, and put on their favorite music.
But he did say that he was getting too old to run the shop, and would pass the business over to his grandson.
Time sure flies.
Why's that?
Because I have Oripathy, milady.
It's bad for your health to come too close to me. Please call upon me only when it is necessary.
What's that? Does it hurt?
...It doesn't hurt, but, I will die because of it.
There is no cure for this disease, milady.
And...
I just have to find the cure then!
Heh, just you wait! One day, I'll defeat that illness, and snatch you back from its jaws!
The reason I became an Originium researcher was because of her. I wanted to cure her.
That has always been the thing motivating me. I even went to Victoria to pursue this dream.
However, Originium research is very difficult. At the beginning, I couldn't even grasp the basic concepts and felt like giving up. But I persevered.
Victoria is also very far away, and I couldn't get used to it at first.
But now, I feel like I'm more of a Victorian than a Siestan.
Doctor, could it be said that everything I have is an illusion?
I'm willing to pay anything to protect this place.
Hmm... I suppose so. There's no way you'd be able to know.
Then what is it? Something she can't even tell me about?
Besides, no matter what she's struggling with, that much is inevitable because of the sins she has committed.
Doctor, do you think I should give up?

opts: I can't answer that for you...
But you are a true Originium researcher.

lines.x: Can we vanquish Oripathy?
Can we save the Infected?
Will there be an end to these tribulations?
If there is, I can't see it. I'm not sure. I don't know how to answer.
Can I just give up? Yes.
But I don't want to.

opts: Perhaps the land we've been born into is blighted...
But the things that you've done have not been in vain.
Believe in the choices you've made.

lines.x: Phew... You're right, Doctor.
Your experience really shows. Looks like I still have a lot to learn.
First, I need to stop being sentimental and start by finding the proof.
If they are really putting citizens in danger on purpose, I'll do everything in my power to stop them!
Because I believe in my own decisions, I'll fight to save this city, even if nobody else will!
Well said.
Oh, Mister Hellagur!
By the looks of things, you've found your answer.
Mhm. Mister Hellagur, Doctor, could you hear me out?
No matter what, I don't want to see the citizens being put into danger. That's my number one priority. The largest broadcast tower here is located by the Garrison Amusement Park.
It controls this city's entire broadcast system.
The broadcast tower?
However, it's controlled by Cronin's henchmen. He often appears there to speak to the citizens.
When the major concert begins, everyone's going to be gathered by the stage. Cronin's men are going to be have their hands full trying to keep things orderly.
As long as we control the tower at that time, we can spread the news throughout the whole city.
So, I'm asking both of you, please lend me your aid!
Everyone, are you getting all fired up?!
In order to welcome the hottest concert in the Obsidian Festival...
Starting from 12 o'clock today, all the malls, recreational facilities, and even some of your favorite bars and restaurants will hold a variety of warm-up activities!
You do not want to miss out!
I knew you'd come here, milady.
Schwarz...
I knew you'd come here. After Cronin turned you down, you'd try to use the broadcast tower to spread the news so that the entire city would hear it.
This won't work, milady. It will only cause confusion and chaos.
Perhaps you hate your father and this city, but Master Doykos has already given enough. This will lead to the demise of the Obsidian Festival and Siesta as a whole.
I know that the news will cause an uproar and maybe even have far-reaching consequences, but the truth needs to be heard.
I know Master Doykos has made mistakes in the past. Though he has done a lot of wrong, Siesta would not exist were it not for his actions.
This has nothing to do with that!
Feel free to criticize me if you must, but please do not do something that is beyond redemption.
Do you... do you really think I'm just some child throwing a temper tantrum?
No, milady. I'll try to persuade Master Doykos, I promise you. But just for now, let's head back together.
Schwarz... Don't talk to me like that.
I know you and Master Doykos currently do not see eye to eye, but for the time being, you should head home first.
I told you not to talk to me like that! I know that you're trying to mend our relationship, but could you not be like that?!
Why can't you treat me like you used to? Talk to me as a friend, Schwarz!
I am simply a servant of the Doykos family.
Don't say that, Schwarz. I don't want to hear you talk like that! What happened to you? Why would you treat me like this?
What are you doing? Seize her this instant!
...She is the master's daughter. Watch your words.
But the mayor told you to give your full support to Mister Cronin! Are you going to let her destroy Siesta with her poisonous rumors?
...Use your brain for a moment. She came here alone, without even the slightest show of anxiety...
Do you really think she's trying to enter the broadcast tower?
What?!
Forget it.
Milady, you're using yourself to distract me, right?
...You still know me well.
I wouldn't say that, milady. But since you didn't deny it, I can surmise as much.
Right now, Rhodes Island should already be at the City Hall.
Wh-what?! That's not a part of the plan! What's going on at the City Hall?
I'd assume the thugs over there are getting a good beating just about now.
Why's it so quiet out there? I told them to hurry up and carry the materials away. They dare slack off on such an urgent task?
Hmm? What was that noise? Did another fight break out? Whatever, I need to finish that task...
Sir, please open the door! We have a package to deliver!
(Huh? Did any of you order something?)
(No? That's weird...)
You've got the wrong address!
But sir, the label on the parcel says it's right here...?
Get lost! If you keep bothering us, I'm gonna teach you a lesson!
Tsk... Sly little devil, trying to trick us again.
Ah, screw it! Doctor, stand aside, I'm kicking the door down!
What?! Don't worry! I'm more than strong enough!
Huh?
Hah!
Whaaaat?! The main door...! My god, what kind of monster are you—

opts: Friends, you mustn't be so rude to the courier.

lines.x: Hehe, I've always wanted to give that a try. And now, there's this line...
Um, ahem!
'FBI! Open up!'

opts: But you already kicked the door down...

lines.x: Schwarz, the years I spent studying in Victoria weren't just for show.
There, I studied the most cutting-edge science and technology pertaining to Catastrophe and Originium research.
Things that seem to fall within the realm of the divine to you, may well be a fact of reality for me.
Everything that I've learned, as well as everything I believe in, tells me that I am right.
Milady, you did not go to law school.
Huh...?
What is Rhodes Island trying to do at the City Hall?
Searching for evidence to use against Cronin.
Hmm?
Cronin may be slimy, but he's not stupid.
He's a Catastrophe Messenger. There's no way he doesn't know about the volcano's situation.
I'm sure he's hiding the truth for his own benefit, and as long as we can gather the evidence secretly...
I think Rhodes Island will confront him directly, so that whole secret search is unlikely to succeed.
It-it's fine! Since you're not there...
Milady, I want to know why you're doing this. If you give me a reasonable answer, I won't go after Rhodes Island.
...This is something I have to do. I don't believe that my father is such a cold-blooded person. He would never stand by idly and let this happen.
My father loves this city more than anyone else. And I know that better than anyone else.
Do you still hate him?
Why would I? If anything, he should be the one who hates me, because my birth took my mother's life...
But he never resented me.
What I hate is how he arranges everything for me and never tells me what he's planning.
It may seem like he's protecting me, but the end result is that I only end up ignorant and helpless.
Just like right now! It must be Cronin's fault; he must have hidden the truth about the eruption from my father.
That's the only reason he ordered Cronin to stop me! Would you call that hate?
Eruption?
What Cronin said was, you were going to reveal Master Doykos's secrets, so that he would be dismissed and put on trial.
What?! No, what did my father even do in the past?
Don't worry about it.
...Hmm, I see what is going on now.
So Cronin wasn't even under my father's orders when he tried to capture me. Phew, that about clears things up.
Schwarz, if I really wanted to do something like that, I would have gone through legal channels.
Everything that I'm doing is also for the sake of this city, my hometown.
I understand. Milady, you're not concerned about the past, or about social standings.
I feel the same way as you. As does your father.
Phew... No matter what others think, I'll always trust you and my father.
Even if there's a conflict between our goals, I trust that we'll be able to resolve things between the two of us.
That's why I believed that you'd be here. We both understand this city well.
That's why you'd come to stop me.
Come to think of it, it doesn't really matter who the mayor is, right? I'm sure that's what my father would think. What he cares about is this city.
That's why I know he'll agree with me.
Schwarz... wouldn't you agree?
You've grown, milady.
EVERYONE!! ARE YOU READY?!!
The greatest collaborative concert of the Obsidian Festival will begin in just three hours!
WOOOOOOOOOO!!!
It's about time. As long as Schwarz and Rhodes Island can fight each other to a standstill, things will go smoothly here.
I knew pitting them against each other would be a masterful move. Heh.
Hurry up! Move these things out of here! Pick up the pace, or you won't be seeing your paychecks!
Hmm? What's that sound coming from outside?
Doctor, if we just rush into the broadcast tower, I'm sure we'll run straight into Cronin's ambush.
If we move together, Schwarz will definitely try to disarm your forces first, and I won't be able to contain her at all.
Even if we seize the broadcast tower by force, without the support of the government, my words will only confuse the public and cause panic.
If Schwarz is protecting Cronin, that will prove to be a major obstacle for you.
Most importantly, you'll have to figure out a way to find out whatever Cronin is hiding.
Maybe Cronin really is innocent, but...
In that case, we'd just force him to announce the news?
Right. If that's what it boils down to, I don't mind using force, since I was thinking the same thing.
That takes some guts, Miss Ceylon. Maybe even borders on reckless.
Rhodes Island has already proven my conclusion through their lab tests. If I don't do this, countless lives are going to be lost here.
I'm not trying to blame you, Miss. I just don't get to decide whether Rhodes Island can go along with your plan.
Do you mean...
Doctor. You should be well aware of our options as well as their consequences. What should we do?

opts: We've already come this far. There's only one thing to do!
Letting countless innocents suffer violates our credo.

lines.x: So, who will take responsibility for this?

opts: Nobody, as long as no-one finds out.

lines.x: That's our Doctor.
Miss Ceylon, let's go before it's too late.
Doctor...

opts: Do what you have to do.

lines.x: I understand. I'll hold Schwarz back.
Besides, there's something I must do. I need to know the answer...
Schwarz...
Why are you pushing me away?
Milady, you've received an education in Victoria. You belong somewhere better. Don't stay here and struggle with people like us.
...No. I don't agree with that.
Schwarz, what do you think I see you as? And what do you think of me as?
I am not the person you think I am, milady.
Because you've killed someone?
Because you've killed many people?
No, milady. That's enough.
Perhaps we're both mistaken, Schwarz.
I don't want you to know about that, milady!
Sorry.
...Milady?
I already know. I've already heard about your past... even if it's just a little bit of it.
I'm sorry if you didn't want me to learn about it, but I can't just feign ignorance.
No, milady! You're not supposed to know that! You should have...
I should have what? Kept doing what was expected of me? Kept studying hard, and then rise to the upper class? As if!
I'm not some delicate flower, nor am I an ignorant little princess! I have something that I must do!
All of us have a responsibility to protect Siesta. You and I, and my father as well! None of us are bystanders!
You didn't want me to get involved in this in order to protect me, right?
No, I...
You're just like my father. Trying to dictate everything for me because it's 'for my own good,' but I don't think so!
So what if what I'm doing is dangerous? So what if you have a dark past?! Maybe I'll cry or be terrified or even be hurt by these things...
But if you ever say 'Ceylon, I need your help,' I'll always be there for you! No matter what you have to say, I'll always lend you my ear!
If we really are friends, then we should do that for each other. How can we be considered friends when you're the only one doing the giving?!
So, Schwarz, would you help me right now?
You asked me before why I'm doing this. And this is my answer...
So, would you give me your response, Schwarz? If what happened in the past is truly in the past, could you be my friend again, just like before?
Milady... I'm sorry. I'm sorry for what I've done and said. My actions have caused a misunderstanding between us that never should have happened...
Ah...
Milady, you are my friend. And you always have been.
Are you two still chit-chatting? What's the verdict? What's going on over there?
Milady, please tell me, what are we going to do next?
Huh? I, um... I'd like to spread the news about the impending Catastrophe through official channels.
Rhodes Island should be collecting evidence against Cronin as we speak, and he'll soon be kicked out of the City Council...
However, after the news gets out, the Obsidian Festival will have to be canceled, and Siesta will have to move...
Don't worry, milady.
R-really?
If that's what you desire, then I will support you.
Schwarz...
Milady, do you need me to protect you?
Mm, yes.
In that case, please take cover. It'll be over soon.
Schwarz, what are you doing? Are you disobeying Cronin's orders?
Orders? Support Cronin? That's just a disguise. Since the very beginning, I've only had two orders.
First, Master Doykos asked me to collect evidence against Cronin, including his secret manipulation of V3 Industries and his unauthorized harvesting of obsidian.
Now that the truth has come to light, the gig is up.
G-get them, quickly! Seize both of them, now!
As for the second order, you just heard it.
...Milady asked me to protect her.
Th-they've all been knocked out? I... never knew you were so powerful.
I've thought about it before, but...
That's why I didn't want you to know.
But that was amazing! You're really cool, Schwarz!
Ugh...
How'd you jump that high?! You ran up the wall and did a somersault!
Then you spun around in midair and dodged all their shots!
Then you turned around, and bang bang! You took them all out just like that! My goodness!
Milady... You're making me blush.
But Schwarz, there is one thing I have to correct. I wasn't giving you an order. That was just a request from a friend.
If you ever need anything from me, just tell me.
Understood.
Hmm? What did I just say?
...Huh?
There's no need to talk like that! We're friends, friends!
Um... sure then.
Haha! Let's head to the City Hall now. I wonder how Rhodes Island is doing...
These imbeciles... They can't even stop a little girl?!
But she's a Sarkazian! Plus, there are several others with her!
It's only a handful of them!
D-damn it! What is Rhodes Island doing here?!
Huh... Feels like these guys are even weaker than Originium slugs...
Call everyone over here right now!
But, Mister Cronin...
I don't think numbers are going to help!
No such thing! Don't you dare take a step back!
*yawn*... Hey Doctor, did you find it yet? I still want to go see that concert. We're going to miss it if we take too long here.

opts: Mhm. I've already found the logbooks and bonds.

lines.x: Huh? You found it? See, beating some sense into them works after all. Meteorite was right. Sometimes, violence solves everything!
D-Damn it all!
Whatever. As long as I can get out of here, it's easy enough to forge a registration.
Ah, Doctor, he jumped out from the window!
Okay~
Hmm, the General is still out there, right? I feel like this Cronin is going to have a tragic end... It would've been better for him to stay inside.
C'mon, Doctor, I'll help you out!
*gasp* *gasp*... Damn it...
I've got... to call the others back right now!
Last time, it was Miss Ceylon and the Doctor of Rhodes Island jumping out from that window.
This time, it's you. Karma is poetic, isn't it, Mister Cronin?
These things happen in life, sir.
You... You! What'd you do to them? What'd you do to them?!
They'd be an eyesore to the beautiful view here.
By the way, you've kept these young ladies waiting for quite some time.
Schwarz...
You two are standing together, which means...

opts: You can't escape the law. We have all the evidence.

lines.x: Doctor, please be careful. He may make one last desperate attempt.
Damn you... All of you...!
Your plot has been exposed, Cronin!
So, you knew all along.
How long did you expect this lie to last?
Ohh, the concert is about to start...
Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the Obsidian Festival!
Are you all having a great time?!
(Thunderous cheering)
What a warm reception! But let me tell you something - you don't know anything about the true charm of the Obsidian Festival yet!
Tonight, all the musicians that have been invited here will come together to bring you a feast for your senses!
One main stage. Four large stages. Twelve small stages. Forty musicians from all kinds of genres will keep the show going for eighteen straight hours until the sun rises tomorrow!
Tell me now, ARE YOU READY?!!
(Thunderous cheering)
...Ceylon told me about the situation with the volcano.
You tampered with the station's data and even accused Miss Ceylon of spreading false rumors.
That's because we both know. We both know about what Herman did!
Just say it then, if you already know.
Go on, Cronin. But make sure to also tell them what you did when I was 'out on business.' Tell them everything.
F-Father...?!
What are you doing here?!
Surprised to see me, Cronin?
After I banned obsidian mining, there has still been a steady influx of fresh obsidian into the market.
The mining team has been seen many times at the volcano's entrance, but nobody reported anything to me.
The resources they mined would be transferred numerous times before finally arriving at the City Hall's abandoned warehouse.
Despite the fact that I set aside funding to provide support for the various Oripathy patients who came to Siesta, I learned that they were actually suffering from discrimination throughout the city.
Does this news surprise you?
Tsk...
Well, hearing about it made my blood boil!
In order to find out the truth, I pretended to leave the city and asked Schwarz to investigate for me.
Looks like just investigating these records on the relevant personnel was enough.
Mister Hellagur, you're all safe!
What a pity, Cronin.
Originally, I was not opposed to sharing things with you, but you were too impatient.
Me? Impatient?
Everything I did was for the sake of this city! You were the one who taught me that!
What happened to the Baru family ten years ago, the collapse of the television station eight years ago, and the way you persuaded...
Or, should I say, 'annexed?' Yes, the way you annexed the Tarak Tribe. I know all about these things.
Everything I've done, I learned from you...
Exploit, and abandon. Use any means necessary. The ends justify the means.
Do you know all the sweat, blood, and tears I've poured into this shabby hole? And what did I get in return?
We worked so hard to mine the volcano and finally managed to improve our situation, but what did you do? You squandered it all to subsidize those incurable Infected!
If that's going to be the case, I'd prefer an eruption! All I need is to protect the true value of Siesta, and then I shall rise once again!
True that I've done many things in the past. But never have I wagered the fate of Siesta.
What do you think about the lives of the miners and researchers, about the lives of everyone living in this city?
Cronin, you're fired.
Ahahahahaha! You senile fool, I wouldn't be so sure about that!
Thanks to your delusional prattling, my men have all assembled!
Hmm? Wait a sec, how'd I burn it already?
Matterhorn! Take a look at this!
What the heck... It feels like the temperature flow has changed...
Woaaaah! Huge waves!!
Wait! They're getting even bigger! That's way too crazy, ahahahaha!
Why are you all quiet now? Don't you normally love to run your mouth?
I'm thinking.
Huh, never thought I'd see the day when you of all people would be stunned speechless.
My mind is racing. Give me a second to calm down.
No, I'm not a geologist, nor do I know anything about Originium physics or high-energy Originium Arts, but...
High-energy Arts has nothing to do with the ecology of a volcano. I doubt that stuff is going to fix our problem.
If there's no other way, maybe I can create a giant vessel and transfer all the energy into it...
But I'd need several years to draft Arts like that. Impossible, that's not gonna work at all.
I have no idea about any of that! But what I do know is, we're in serious trouble! Very serious trouble!
Of course we are! Otherwise, why would I get excited?!
Hurry up and figure something out then!
What do you think I'm doing?!
I need to let the Doctor know right away...
So please think faster. I'll send the message right now! Also, don't let the heat short-circuit your brain!
I'm keeping my cool.
You just said you were excited! Look, even your hair is on fire!
Hmm, massive geological shifts caused by a disruption of the ecological chain... Aha! It's not doomsday just yet!
What happened? Hello?
Hmm? Did something happen? What's going on outside?
Please don't worry. Everything is perfectly fine. Come this way please.
The guests are all here, and they will take the stage in 2 minutes and 30 seconds.
Quick! Take care of whatever is going on outside.
As things stand, you don't have any prestige left, Herman!
I've spent years training these people. Only they truly understand the wonderful life that comes from hard work!
Today is the climax of the festival. I'll take what has always rightfully belonged to me, and then bounce.
I bet you still have no idea what's going on.
Let me tell you out of mercy's sake. The data you got from the monitoring station is wrong. The volcano will very soon become active.
Originium will spread along with the eruption, and at least half of this city will be destroyed!
But I won't lose anything. I'll even come back after the eruption to mine the Originium!
Siesta is my paradise! I also deeply love this city, Herman!
How dare you!
Of course I dare, as the Catastrophe Messenger of this city.
But all you can do is witness your defeat, then the destruction of Siesta!
Of course, you will get the honor of dying to the eruption of the Siesta Volcano. Other than me, nobody else shall know about the secrets of this city.
Rhodes... Island...
I'm disappointed in you, Cronin.
Disappointed? You're the one who's disappointed? No, I'm disappointed in you!
I'll never forget the days when I lost my home, those sleepless nights in the dumpsters trying to take shelter from the elements!
Wealth is the key to a new life, and I've since come to understand that! But what about you? You wasted the money we worked so hard to earn on some Infected filth?!
Are you going to bury the infinite potential of Siesta beneath your hypocrisy?
Take a good look at yourself, Cronin.
And take all the time in the world to reflect upon what you see, in prison!
You've been by my side for fifteen years, but you've learned nothing.
All you've managed to pick up are some unsavory tactics. What a dullard you are.
Dullard? Ahaha... Ahahahaha!
Old man, surely you didn't expect me to be out of moves already!
What's going on?
This... Could it be the earthquake preceding the eruption?!
Ahaha, come! It's finally here!
Turn into ashes along with this city!
It's too late now! Even if you take control of the broadcast tower, the people will only start panicking!
The volcano is about to erupt, but what can you possibly accomplish with that 'data' of yours?
I control all the escape passages! None of you are going to get away!
You bloody hypocrites can't save anyone!
Everything will be burnt to nothingness, along with the city!
Doctor, what do we do?!

opts: Get all the operators to help with the evacuation, now!
At least get everyone to where it's safe!

lines.x: Doctor, should we mobilize the entirety of Rhodes Island...
Doctor, can you hear me? I've finished analyzing the volcano!
If we act now, we can still buy more time!
Doctor, we've already determined the underlying cause of the volcano's activity. There's a good possibility that we might be able to stop the eruption!
Everyone, please stay calm and listen closely. If you follow my instructions, we will be able to delay the eruption!
We can definitely help, if it's really something within our power.
...Mhm.
No, please let us handle this.
Cronin has been plotting this for a long time. His henchmen must be all over the city.
This is the critical moment. Schwarz, Mister Hellagur, you have your own duties.
We can leave those things to the others...
But this is our mission.
Ceylon...
Agreed.
We're Catastrophe Messengers, volcanologists, and Originium researchers. None of us will just sit and watch while peoples' lives are threatened by something predictable.
What's more, there are people who would use their knowledge to deceive others and line their own pockets. As a Catastrophe Messenger, I can't tolerate seeing people like that!
I've never seen you get this serious before, but I understand. In any case, Mayor, allow us to aid you with the evacuation.
...Very well. Schwarz, you should come too.
Ceylon said she can handle this.
...Milady, please be careful.
Have we finished deciding? We don't have much time!
Okay! Let's get going right now!
We should trust her. Besides, what she said was right. We each have our own duty to fulfill.
Gahahaha! They're just rushing towards death! Even if they manage to buy an hour or two, so what?!
Your daughter is going to get buried along with most of this city, and you won't even be able to find her body...
Guh...
Sorry, I couldn't control myself.
Don't worry. He's right about the threat this poses. We can't afford to endanger the citizens any longer.
Please lend me your assistance.
I never knew there was a cave like this on the other side of the volcano.
This used to be a natural cave, but after extensive mining, it's turned into a deep shaft.
Be prepared, everyone. We still have a long way to go once we're inside.
Our actual destination is in the depths of this cave.
Even when I was back in the Lab, I never imagined that I'd be diving deep into a volcano during my vacation.
Can you explain what's going on to me now? That phone call was way too obscure. What did she mean by 'there's a good chance to stop the eruption?'
Hmm... I think Skyfire can explain it better. Help me out here.
Provence and I came to this conclusion after exploring the volcano, and we discussed it with Eyjafjalla.
To explain the theory, we'd first have to talk about the habitat of the Originium slugs... Or rather, we should call them volcanic slugs or lava slugs.
Even though they look just like normal Originium slugs, these creatures feed upon the special obsidian found in this volcano.
These Originium slugs make their colony very close to the core of the volcano, where lava mixes with special components to form large quantities of this obsidian.
Once the people here discovered that this obsidian was special, they followed the slugs' tracks to locate the source.
I see. I've read about this before. People in some places take advantage of the animals' habits to locate and exploit resources.
People can always draw connections from interacting with other creatures.
The problem is, there hasn't been an eruption in a long time, and the supply of obsidian started to dwindle.
Overmining doesn't just affect the industries involved, but also destroys the Originium slugs' natural habitat.
As a result, they became increasingly restless and started to burrow more and more in search of new habitats. This is most likely the source of the abnormal internal activity within the volcano.
Doing this may be effective for keeping the colony alive, but the end result is a Catastrophe for Siesta.
...'If we do not protect the gifts from Nature, then Nature will instead grant us punishment.'
So, what should we do now?
Is there some method to block the volcano?
We should approach it from a different perspective. We actually need to pacify the host of this abode.
Let's hurry it up. We need to go deeper.
It's getting hotter and hotter...
It's just in front of us...
Everyone, be careful!
That roar... It sounds... as if it's crazed.
Of course. These slugs are not intelligent enough to individually explore this volcano so extensively, so there must be a queen in the colony.
She is the host that we're searching for.
...We're supposed to find that queen out of all of these slugs?
What are you talking about? This volcanic Originium slug is powerful enough to trigger an eruption. She is the true host of this volcano! We should definitely be able to discern her from a glance!
The possibilities are endless for organisms that evolved under extreme environmental conditions. You never know, this slug might be powerful enough to melt an entire Defender squad.
Are you saying that these tremors were caused by a single Originium slug...?
There's nothing to be afraid of, as long as I'm here. It doesn't matter how much these slugs may have mutated--
Wh-what's that?!
How can this be... The lava is already coming out?!
No, that's the mutant Originium slug! Head down the cave!
Grooooooarrr!!
Grooooooarrr!!
The temperature is rising... No Originium slug should be able to maintain such a high temperature...
...You're still calling it a slug? That's more like a moving volcano, don't you think?
Well... I didn't get to draw any detailed inferences, but this is definitely beyond what I had calculated for.
I'm starting to miss Eyjafjalla a little.
Watch out! It's getting closer to us!
Grooooooarrr!!
Groaaaaaaaar...!!!
It... It can even melt through the ground? N-No, look at the wall and the ground. They're covered with these wave-like things...
Move back. They're all lava Originium slugs, enough to cause volcanic activity!
I suppose this confirms our target then.
As long as we can pacify it and redirect its route, the citizens should have enough time to evacuate!
Hold on, hold on! How are we supposed to 'pacify' this mini-volcano?!
By beating it down! What else can we do?
It's got such a massive body though! What if it explodes here? Are you sure that won't cause an eruption?!
Let's just ask it to go home really nicely then!
Hmm...
I suppose we have to take it down one way or another!!
Watch out!
Haah!
Hyah!
Is it really getting weaker? I can't tell from the appearance at all!
Watch out for the lava! Just how much obsidian has this thing absorbed?!
GROOOAAAAARRRRR!!!
Poor thing... But we can't afford to show it any mercy! Skyfire!
All right, I got it! Time to go all out!
Well then, how do you like the taste of this?!
Grooooooarrr!!
It's becoming enraged...! I'll block its way. The rest of you, focus on attacking!
Big tail!!
I finally managed to land a hit through a crack in the lava, but I can't guarantee that it's going to work on something of this size!
We did it! It's heading the other way!
Yes! The citizens are going to be safe now!
Good grief! I can't believe a single slug would be that hard to deal with! My skirt is all ruined...
It was the leader of the colony after all.
If people didn't destroy their habitat in the first place, then perhaps...
I'm exhausted! Let's not bring up that tiresome topic again!
Haha, me too. I'm so tired I can barely stand.
But, we have to head back to Siesta. There are people waiting for us there...
Oof!
That's understandable, but a mature lady should also learn to get help if she's not even able to keep her balance.
Th-thank you...
All right, let's go take our victory lap now. Once we get back, there might still be some time for us to enjoy our vacation.
But... sooner or later, this place will...
Big tail?
Ah, I'm coming.
Skyfire...
I know.
But we should respect the city's choice, and let them handle the rest, right?
Doctor, I have to blame you for what happened this time.
Everyone has been injured to some degree. As the leader, you're responsible for that!
Gummy has already finished treating them, but it's going to sting if they get in the water.
Jeez, you need to show some more reservation when leading your teams.

opts: That swimsuit looks good on you, Amiya.

lines.x: Um, it's not like I'm trying to trample on your good will...
Is, is that so? Miss Savage picked it out for me... I was so worried that you wouldn't like it--
W-wait! Don't you try to play that trick on me, Dr. Doctor!

opts: We did go a bit overboard this time...

lines.x: Good grief... And I have a word for Mister Hellagur as well!
I explicitly told him to keep an eye on you, so why did he turn a blind eye...
Until a contract is signed, Rhodes Island is not allowed to intervene in the internal affairs of an independent city-state.
If we get caught up in legal repercussions, Rhodes Island will be in a very tight spot.
Yes, I know.
Doctor, you really did something very dangerous.
...Why were you fighting with crazed fans anyway! If you're an adult, you should act like one.
No matter how much you like a band, you need to be nice to the other audience members, and you certainly can't pick fights with them!
(Shush!)
No more questions! That wraps up this incident! Okay!
Be more careful next time, okay?
All right!
Doctor, come with me. I found lots of beautiful seashells on the other side of this reef. Beaches are absolutely fascinating!
The water isn't cold... Hmm...
Come, Doctor, it's over here!
Eek! Doctor! Please don't do that!
Darn it! Take this! Ahaha...
Ehehe...
Dr. Doctor, nice to see you.
Ceylon told me many things about Rhodes Island, so I've been very keen on speaking with you.
How about taking a walk with me?
Thank you, Doctor of Rhodes Island.
Had you not helped my daughter, her recklessness would have ended dismally.

opts: I actually didn't do very much.
The one you should be thanking is Ceylon.

lines.x: I trained Cronin myself. His instincts may be base, but he's also very capable. That's why I turned a blind eye on him all these years.
However, as of the last few years, he's gone down a dangerous road, and I can no longer trust him.
This time, I left Schwarz here on purpose just to see if he's still trustworthy.
The results were disappointing.

opts: Why are you telling me all this?

lines.x: ...I enjoy walking along this part of the beach.
That's because my wife, Barbara, sleeps deep beneath these waves.
I still remember that day; the weather was a bit warm, and the sunset was splendid. She turned to me here and said, 'If only we could stay here forever.'
In the blink of an eye, I was left behind.
Doctor, turn around and take a look.
Do you understand now? This city is a paradise I built for her.
As for why I'm telling you this...
Because I can tell that you and I are the same type of person.
In this world, not everything can be resolved with good. Sometimes, we must get our hands dirty.
For me, good and bad lost their meaning a long time ago. The only things that matter to me are results, and this city.
I'm not looking for understanding, Doctor.
If I needed my daughter's understanding, we would not have become like we are now.
Besides, do you think she'd really understand if I told her?
No. She still needs a long time to understand that the world isn't as black and white as she thinks.
Schwarz hopes that she will never understand, but I... Unfortunately, I lost the ability to make that choice.
Doctor, Ceylon would like to join you, so I asked Schwarz to accompany her. I'm fine with it.
After all, this Siesta is no longer her paradise.
I've seen the new geological report. Sooner or later, Siesta will be consumed by the magma.
We've managed to postpone that day's coming. I am grateful for the effort that you've all put forth today.
Over the years, I've been looking for a solution to this matter. I have found it, but the price is almost as great.
The new development zone I've been working on will become a brand new nomadic city. By the looks of things, it will become the next Siesta.
I'm deeply attached to this place, but that doesn't mean that I can ignore the volcano that slumbers fitfully beside me.
After the end of this Obsidian Festival, we will begin moving into the new nomadic city. As for Siesta, we will let her rest until the magma reclaims her.
I heard that this ocean is bounded by land. Some have told me that this isn't a real ocean. It may be wide, but it's not boundless.
In that case, we will continue to follow the coast. Perhaps one day, we will finally return to our starting point, the real starting point.
However, by that time, this beautiful beach, the great Obsidian Festival, and this coastal city with its volcanic smell...
The Siesta that holds the memory of countless people, will be gone forever.
Perhaps one day, you'll be able to tell her what I've told you here today.
Perhaps that day will never come.
And one day, should she perhaps need my help, you can come find me.
No matter where Siesta is or what it looks like, this city will forever support her.
Or rather, I should say... As long as Siestans exist, Siesta also exists. Within the hearts of young people like her are where Siesta really is.
Now, seize the day, and enjoy the Obsidian Festival.
At least until we find another suitable location, we'll have to suspend our collaboration with Siren Records. I have a lot of things to discuss with them.
Schwarz seems to have something to tell you. She's over there.
If I keep talking for much longer, she won't have anything to say. You should hear it from her.
...Sir.
