Don't mind me. This is between you youngsters.
Hello.

opts: Can I buy you a drink?

lines.x: Don't worry, I'm not your enemy anymore.
Oh, hello to you too, stranger.
I'll pass for now.
Actually, I wasn't really going to say anything special.
At first, I was going to give you a good beating. Miss Ceylon never have been subjected to such danger.
But, I have to thank you as well. Without your help, we might never have been able to clear up our misunderstanding.
Truthfully, I did not want her getting involved with these things, but perhaps you were right. She has her own ideas, and her own responsibilities.

opts: You should let her make her own decisions.
Time doesn't flow backwards. This is who she is now.

lines.x: ...Thank you. Were it not for you, everything I loved would have been destroyed by the volcano.
I am in your debt.
Doctor!
Hey, Schwarz, what are you doing here?
...Milady?
Perfect timing. I have something important to announce!
I am going to submit my resume to Rhodes Island.
As I said, I'm interested in joining your company.

opts: It's not easy to get in.

lines.x: Heheh~ I already asked Miss Eyjafjalla and Miss Skyfire about it. They said I have their recommendations.
After seeing your abilities throughout this whole situation, I've come to this decision after careful deliberation.
But Rhodes Island is not a simple drug company...
That's why I want you to come with me.
By the way, my father already approved of it.
...I know. If that is what you desire, milady.
So, Doctor, we're going to be colleagues from now on!
Come on, Doctor! The experiment is about to start!
Ah fine, forget it. Schwarz, go drag Doctor over here!
...Your voice is loud enough to crack the ceiling, milady. I'm sure the Doctor has heard it.
...Doctor, I don't know what you're waiting for, but in times like these, Miss Ceylon won't care what we're thinking.
It would behoove you to walk over there yourself. It'd be a bit unsightly if you really wanted me to carry you over.

opts: Don't worry. I'll keep an eye on her.

lines.x: Very well.
Please wait a moment, milady. We'll be there shortly.
Let's go, Doctor.
Hello? Excuse me? Is anyone home? There's no way you'd be refusing to pick up again, right?
Hello? Ah, ohh! There, there you are!
Hey, I finally got through...
You should've made it over there already, yeah? So, how's Siesta?
Get a load of this. The Doctor said it's so hot over there, people sometimes pass out on the streets. Then, they get woken up later with free beer. That true?
Ah, by the way, which celebrities did they book for the music festival this time? Is the Emperor gonna be there?
Oh, have you seen anyone from Alive Until Sunset? I play their songs as my background music. Listen to this one—
If you have something to say, spit it out already. Otherwise, I'm hanging up.
Wait, hold up, c'mon bro, don't be like that!
I do have something to tell you, so don't hang up, man!
Sigh...
If you wanted to come that badly, why aren't you here?
Because I can't, man! Did you think I wanted to stay behind?
Since all you guys went, someone had to stay behind on the ship. Plus, I also had some internal stuff to deal with. You know, that Gavial, she—
Stop. Don't tell me about your missions.
Eh, it's nothing classified. But still, there is that one thing that's rather...
If it's important, get to the point. Thirty words or less.
Not cool, bro.
Has anyone ever told you you can be a real wet blanket at times?
Nope.
Poor chap. They must all be too afraid to tell you the truth.
I'm hanging up.
Fine, fine, I'll cut to the chase!
Sigh...

The source isn't that reliable but there might be some trouble at this music festival but since I know you don't really care about that please ask for an autograph if you happen to bump into anyone from Alive Until Sunset! Big thanks in advance!
...Is that all?
Huh? Uh, yeah.
That was forty-five words. You went over by fifty percent.
And, if you blast music at that volume in the office, the Engineering Department will be there to smash your stereo within ten seconds.
Huh?
Wait a sec. Did you need something... Disturbing the work environment? What are you talking ab— ...Aaaah, my bad, ignore what I just said, seriously, it's my fault, please stoppp—
Tch.
Just how much does this guy like that band?
I can almost recite the lyrics myself...... Hmm?
The scenery out here is amazing, but it really is hot and humid! I can practically wring out my wet tail!
The temperature here in Siesta seems even higher than I expected, which is weird... Hey, Skyfire, don't you think so too?
Considering the way we're dressed, it'd be stranger not to be hot.
Eh, good point.

Everyone's too dressed up anyway. Someone might seriously get heat stroke like this, so let's get changed already... Besides, I heard we might have a chance to head down to the beach, so I brought a swimsuit.
Hold up, not yet! Weren't we going to go to the base of the volcano? You'll have to wait until we get back first!
Let's hurry up and get it over with then. I want to kick back and relax on the beach too, y'know. Not every day we get a chance like this!
The beach... and the ocean?
...It doesn't smell like the sea here.
Phew, how many songs was that? We still have another performance tonight. Don't get all excited and blow your energy this early.
No clue, but I'm still having a good time. Frost, you too, right?
(Plucks a chord)
Not like it matters. Nothing's going to burn us out.
Ahaha... Yeah, I guess that's true.
All righty, then. Before the night comes—
Let's party hard! !
(Is this the band that guy is so crazy about? They seem like a really noisy bunch.)
(Also...)
(Something's weird about them. Can't put my finger on it though.)
(Is it because of this song? What exactly... is this familiar feeling?)
Have you found the Young Miss?!
Hurry up! After them, they couldn't have gotten far!
This way, we have to bring her back!
Hey, stop squeezing! How rude!
Who the hell stepped on my foot?
Who cares about those people? It's time for the next song! Woooah, it's the first song off their album Deep Color in the Sea!
Huh?
(Just now, who were those people looking for?)
(Based on the way they're dressed, they're no ordinary group of civilians...)
Excuse me, sorry, let me through please!
Phew, I finally made it out...
What's the hurry?
Eep! Who are you?!
Oh, it's Thorns... Don't scare me like that... Anyway, since you're here, does that mean you're also a fan of Alive Until Sunset?

Right, I just remembered, you're also Ægirian. Feels like every Ægir I've met has some special connection with them. The sea they sing about is so much more beautiful and intense than the waves of Siesta!
Ah, crap, that's not what I'm supposed to be talking about!
The Doctor and the others seem to be in a bit of a pickle, so I'm on my way to help out! Since you're already here, don't just stand around, let's go help out—
There's no need for me to go.
Huh? Why's that?
They have the old geezer from Ursus with them this time. They'll be fine.
...Uhh, that came out wrong. Rather...
I did not receive any direct communications, which means my presence is not required.
I fully expect that the Doctor has a level of control over the situation. A commander of that caliber would never do anything to endanger our operators.
Until I've received specific instructions, there is no need for me to participate in your operation.
Don't underestimate the Doctor and rush to your own arbitrary decisions. You may end up causing more harm than good.
That's what I've inferred. Are there any issues?
None.
None at all. But, I did figure something out.
You and I. We definitely aren't getting along! Imagine having to think that much every time anybody asks you something!
Oops, I don't even know why I'm talking to you. The Doctor asked for my help, not yours. Right?
All right, you just sit here and keep enjoying the show. I have somewhere to be.
What's with her tone?
I don't get it.
Have you heard, there's a barbecue stall in the food court by the beach? They're having a half-off deal, and the line's snaking all the way out to the street!
How about it? Wanna see what the hype is all about?
Barbecue, in this weather? It's way too hot, I think I'll pass...
Hey, don't be like that. Is there anything better for the fiery atmosphere of this music festival than some barbecue on the hot beach next to a raging charcoal fire?
And with so many people lined up, I bet the flavor's out of this world! It'd be a shame not to give it a try!
We're on vacation, and we came all the way out here. C'mon, my treat!
You're talking just like my aunts and uncles... But fine, since you're so worked up about this, let's go check it out.
Huh? What's the sound over there?
What did y'all say?
C'mon, louder! I can't hear you—
ONE— MORE— SONG—!!
ENCORE—!!
Looks like they set up a temporary stage. Not sure which band is performing on this street though.
Don't you think that's much more interesting than some barbecue? Look at all the people there - what if that's some famous musician...
Hey, who hit me?!
Watch out.
Ah, uh.... Um, th-thank you...
Woah, that's rad! They're way too awesome! !
I've never heard this band before! The scene here is even better than I imagined...
I knew I made the right call. Enjoying some good music is way better than barbecue in the middle of the summer! I don't know when they're releasing their next album, but I'll definitely buy it!
I see how it is. You're just not into barbecue...
You only now realize...?
Alright, let's drop it. By the way, where's your purse?
...Huh?
I could've sworn I had it with me...
Are you looking for this?
Eep!
What have you done? How could you just strike me like that?! Gyaaaaaaaah, my arm! Aaaargh!!
Stop your sniveling. It's not broken.
I hate noise. Should I shut you up some other way?
(Gurgles strangely as if his throat is being pinched)
Here.
Oh, my purse!
Two watches, four wallets, and a woman's bracelet. It seems that being immersed in music can indeed cause one to let her guard down. Everyone is alike in that regard.
It must've been quite easy to get your hands on these things. Otherwise, you wouldn't have the gall to do it again and again.
Wh-what are you talking about?! These are mine! They belong to me...
Rubbish.
Your slipshod lie is an utter waste of my time.
Y-yeah! That clearly is my purse!
Huh? There really are thieves running around? Maybe those black suits back there were chasing after thieves!
Black suits? They are not so well-intentioned.
Make sure to hold on to your things. If there is nothing else, I need to bring this one to his other victims.
Wh-wh-wh-what are you talking about?! What victims?!
Let me go right now or I'm reporting you to—
Silence.
Gyaahhhh! !
Um, Mister, of course, we believe you're in the right, but how do you know where these other victims are?

Uhh...
Uhh...
Uhh— Pffffff! *cough* *cough* Pffff! Pffff!

*cough* *cough* Sorry, it's my fault. I shouldn't have tried to do that after all. I thought it'd be fine if I just helped grill something...

...I'm not going to hold you back any more, Ifrit. It's all you now.

If there's something you don't know, go learn it. If you fail once, fail a second time. If you fail a second time, fail a third time. Now that you know the cause of the accident, avoid it next time.
Compensation is unnecessary. Accidental explosions of this magnitude occur all the time, and are insubstantial.
Ifrit, I...
How long are you going to slack off?
Huh? Huh?
I said, how long are you going to slack off?! C'mon, damn it! Hold this! I wanna get the stove set up again!
Stop gawking and get back to work already! You're the one who ran over here asking to help out, so don't you dare think of slinking off!

Me? Are you sure?
Got a problem? Nobody ever said you can't. Or, did you decide that yourself?
Tch, what a pain. This box is buried so damned deep in the sand, and it's so heavy you can't even dig it out.
Hey, where's the pepper? Why the hell is there no more pepper? Argh...! This is pissing me off!

What are you two doing? Do you require my assistance?

Hm? Is Ifrit not offering me words of praise?
Huh?

Y-you dumbass! Think before you open your big mouth!

Homesick? I dunno what that's like, but as long as I'm with Silence and Saria, anywhere is home. Is Rhodes Island not good enough?

Hm...

How did we start talking about this...?

Kind-hearted? That's a weird way to put it.

Yeah...

Eep!
Why are you still here?!

Oh...

Wh-who the hell would thank you anyway?!
Ugh, what a weirdo.
He may be strange... but he truly is a good person, no?

Hey.
Hey, I know you're there.
....Hey. Speak. You've been standing behind me for quite some time now.
No way! How'd you catch me...? You must be pretty awesome to be able to sniff me out.
So, what do you think of the view? Not bad, huh?
...The singer from that band. What are you doing here?

Do you ever miss home, Mister?
Songstress, what are you actually here for?

Thorns opens his eyes wide and looks directly into the singer's pupils.

—You didn't even try to hide it.

No.

Yeah, thought so.
'I've heard the ripples of your falling tears~♪ Your darkest nightmares, your deepest fears~♪ Your heart cracked into petals of blood...♪'
What's that song?

Of course...

Elysium has been humming this song every day for two weeks now.
The song seems to be one of the masterpieces from the band the singer belongs to.
And now, the singer...
'The disguise fell off when I remembered, the scar you left me is the pain you forgot~♪

Of course, whether or not you fear it, it will come for you.
It is here. Let's go. Don't look back.
What is she talking about? What is that?
What is that... standing on the water?
The fractured sunset casts faintly mottled shadows upon the water, pulling back the tide in gray waves.
The sound of the world is the sound of breathing is the sound of the ocean, which you listen to without speaking or singing or breathing.
A moment passes, two moments pass, until dozens and hundreds of years pass in silence.
It gazes into you.
Its eyes bore into yours, yearning to slowly crawl in through your wounds.
You are awake as it pulls you into its embrace and you sink into its blood and shadow and sun and hear its eyeless and soundless and lifeless shadow.
As tranquil as a shining star.
Under the surface, there's a waterway that connects to the ocean... It isn't strange that it gives off some ocean vibes.
Hey. Hey, Mister, wake up. Snap out of it already.
Hmph. I couldn't hypnotize you with my song. That makes me a bit jealous.
You're the one who should go.
Huh? Ah... that couldn't be, yeah? Look, you know that...
That's not something that should be here. If you go now, you won't die.
I know, but... aren't you the one who's supposed to leave right now?
Do you have a death wish?
Listen to me carefully...
Æ...gir.
Don't be scared. It shouldn't be surprising that the ocean knows our names.
...No
It is not awe.
Urk...
Then what's your deal then...? Hey, are you having trouble breathing?
Sober up a bit, Mister.
(Ægirian) Nothing can deprive you of the right to breathe on this land.
(Free yourself, hurry...!)

I want to kill It.
Is this a hallucination?

You seem quite knowledgeable about these?

Hey, are you trembling?

Stay if you want. You said I like dancing. What about you then...
Songstress, do you also like to dance?

(A vague, sickening sound)

Yes.

Yes, flourish the sword that weaves with your bounding steps! Spin, pirouette, and glide across the ocean's surface! Whether you are torn apart or you tear It apart, the beginning or end of your story...

Huh? I feel like it should be said here—
—I'd be honored.

(Ring ring ring! Ring ring ring!)

AaaaAAAaaaaAHH~♪
Get up already!
Urgh... Gah!
M-Man... things got gnarly last night! Gimme a few more minutes...

I've just about figured out my limits. Now that I have a better understanding, I'll just have to keep pushing my limits further. That's what improvement is.

'I heard the festival was a great success. Congrats :P'

Wh-what?!

Mister Emperor, this way please.
Ladies and gentlemen! Please move back! Stand behind the line!

(Cheering)
Emperor!! Emperor!! Emperor!!

Columbia's Rap God? You're nothing but a thug, a mongrel that got a little lucky...

Emperor? Eat dirt, you bottom-feeding penguin!

You think I'd forget who you are just because you decided to roll around in the sewers? Will pointing your weapon at these youngsters satisfy you, 'Songster?'
You...!

Protect Mister Emperor!

Ratatat tat! Bang!

*cough* *cough*... Do you really... think I'm alone? Think about all the enemies you've made. You won't leave Siesta alive!

Mister Emperor! Many of his rabble are hidden among the audience. We can't deal with all of them...

Tex- err, I mean, 'Sora,' that's... because you stayed in the hotel reading books the whole time...

Texas, do it.
Got... Oops.
...Got it! It's showtime!
Hmm.

There's something familiar about this atmosphere. Hmm...
If I hadn't boarded this ark, I would've thought I was still at the beach.
We had a few Ægirians here lately.
I suppose you're also from Ægir, but I didn't see your name on the guest list. Perhaps that means I can't treat you as a guest.

Wait, you even know my name?

...Have a seat.

Ask away.
Do you know who the enemy of the Ægir is?
Or perhaps, do you know who I really am?
Mon3tr, stop!

The Abyssal Hunters are doing what they should be doing.

Sorry, bad habit of mine...
I trust you, doctor, and the truth you have.
I don't think you know any less about the truth than I do.
